"-" = Determination precluded by missing data.
564 VA08A VA08A_MOOD_TR (VA08A) Mood State Triggered CHAR 1 RAP summary: mood state - triggered. 0 = Not Triggered, 1 = Triggered, "-" = Determination precluded by missing data.
565 VA08B VA08B_MOOD_PC (VA08B) Mood State Care Planning Decision CHAR 1 RAP summary: mood state - proceed with care. 0 = Not Triggered, 1 = Triggered, "-" = Determination precluded by missing data.
566 VA09A VA09A_BEHAVE_TR (VA09A) Behavioral Symptoms Triggered CHAR 1 RAP
